title: Write commands and some errors bypass the CommandResult envelope
description: Audit finding (MED). task claim/release/finish and report do not emit the CommandResult envelope and accept no --json. validate --json prints the validator's own {ok,errors,warnings} shape (no data field), inconsistent with emitResult. brief's catch labels EVERY failure as no_such_task, masking real record-corruption/IO errors. Non-Record/Mutation throws re-throw past the top-level handler and dump a raw stack instead of an envelope. message post/list/inbox use three different error-reporting styles.
expected: Every command returns the {ok,data,errors,warnings} envelope in --json; all errors are coded diagnostics.
actual: Write commands print bare text; brief mislabels errors; some throws escape unstructured.
next_steps: Return CommandResult from claim/release/finish/report; add --json to them.
Normalize validate --json to the envelope (wrap in data or reuse the shape).
brief: only map genuine not-found to no_such_task; surface other errors with their real code.
Top-level catch: convert any Error to a generic coded diagnostic instead of re-throwing.
